carryOn.notes: Carry-on requires a fee. One personal item included free.

economy.notes: $30–$50+ per bag. Overweight fees apply over 40 lbs.

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Carry-on only for spare lithium batteries

faqs.question: Does Allegiant charge for carry-on bags?
faqs.answer: Yes, Allegiant charges for carry-on bags. Only a personal item (18 x 14 x 7 inches) is included free.

faqs.question: What is Allegiant's weight limit for checked bags?
faqs.answer: Allegiant's checked bag weight limit is 40 lbs. Overweight fees apply for bags between 41–70 lbs.
